title: Datapacks & Maps makers Pack(fabric)
description: A simple modpack than bring togather all the tools for datapack building and map making
body:
## Its simple modpack created with the purpose of combining all useful mods for creating datapacks and maps


my plan is to update this pack when new minecraft version is realesed 
but the specific time depend on the mod creators 
so check the change logs for the specific version to know what mods are included
for more information about the mods check their pages in the links below

feel free to join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/t6BshWUw65) for help or bug reporting.

have fun

some of the mods that included :

- [axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)
- [better command GUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettercommandblockui)
- [Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)
- [Multi scoreboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/multiscoreboard)
- [NBT Autocomplete](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-autocomplete)
- [Worldgen Devtools](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldgen-devtools)
- [sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [sodium extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [Suggestion Tweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/suggestion-tweaker)
- [(F3+T) Everywhere](https://modrinth.com/mod/f3-t-everywhere)
- [NBT Copy](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-copy)
- [Compact Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-chat)
- [Component Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/component-viewer)
- [Hide Experimental Warning](https://modrinth.com/mod/hide-experimental-warning)
- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc)
- [chat patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches)
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
